title: Eight years shipping production systems — IC and tech-lead.
subtitle: Payments, telecom and SaaS. Ali Cloud → AWS migrations, multi-cluster Kubernetes, observability from scratch, and a DevOps UI that cut toil 70%.

items.summary: Tech-lead for platform engineering across 1000+ Kubernetes clusters; building an AI-assisted SRE copilot serving 5000+ engineers across multi-cloud (AWS · GCP · Azure).
bullets: Operate 1000+ EKS / GKE / AKS clusters spanning 14 regions via a unified GitOps control plane (ArgoCD ApplicationSets, Crossplane).
Designed the observability fabric: Prometheus + Thanos + VictoriaMetrics + Grafana + Loki at PB scale with per-tenant SLOs and burn-rate alerts.
Shipping an LLM-assisted SRE copilot (Langfuse-traced, RAG over runbooks) that triages alerts and auto-remediates 1200+ low-risk incidents/week — MTTR down 42%.
Own the platform roadmap end-to-end — cluster lifecycle, cost (FinOps), compliance, and developer experience for 5000+ engineers.
Lead a cross-functional pod of 6–10 engineers; run on-call rotations, incident reviews, and SRE-2/SRE-3 mentoring.

items.summary: Led the PG2 cloud migration (Ali Cloud → AWS) for 50+ payment microservices, built the Release Engineering UI, and shipped a Kubernetes Operator for HPA automation. 2× Rockstar Award + Payment Infinity Award.
bullets: Migrated 50+ payment microservices from Ali Cloud to AWS (EKS) with zero customer-visible downtime; ~30% infrastructure cost reduction.
Built a Release Engineering UI that became the default deploy surface across multiple verticals — toil down 30%, deploys-per-day up.
Designed and shipped a Kubernetes Operator (CRD + controller-runtime) that patches HPAs on configurable day-of-week schedules — eliminated manual scaling toil.
Set up monitoring from scratch — Prometheus + Grafana + APM (Pinpoint, Dynatrace) — sustained 99% infrastructure uptime on PCI-aware payment workloads.
SME for Redis: hardened replication, persistence, eviction and client patterns across production payment paths.
Partnered with risk, security and compliance for automated, auditable cloud environments. Mentored 4–6 DevOps engineers.

items.summary: Capacity planning, cost optimization and infra security across 15+ telecom microservices on AWS. Awarded for outstanding JVM hygiene automation.
bullets: Automated build, deploy and configuration for 15+ microservices on AWS EC2 + ECS.
Drove a 30% cloud cost reduction via capacity planning, right-sizing and reserved/spot strategy.
Hardened infrastructure security; onboarded services to AppDynamics for full-stack APM and incident response.
Owned production availability for AWS workloads — patch management, hardening, and on-call.
Awarded for Outstanding JVM Hygiene — automation across multiple services for measurable reliability gains.

items.summary: Built the PayU DevOps UI (React), led DR migration on Kubernetes, and moved monitoring from commercial to open source — recognized for Big Billion Day reliability.
bullets: Built a custom DevOps UI in React with roles-based authentication — cut toil 70% across verticals; adopted by 100+ engineers.
Led DR migration on Kubernetes (on-prem) and stood up the monitoring foundation.
Transitioned monitoring from commercial tools to Prometheus + Grafana + ELK — flexibility and cost wins.
Migrated infrastructure from a physical data center to AWS with minimal downtime.
Authored Ansible playbooks for configuration management; integrated 2FA into vendor-firewall flow.
Received the Thank You Award for Big Billion Day scale & reliability.
